Journal Article · Advanced Science, 9, 2202332

A Noble AuPtAg-GOx Nanozyme for Synergistic Tumor Immunotherapy Induced by Starvation Therapy-Augmented Mild Photothermal Therapy

Man Wang, Mengyu Chang, Pan Zheng, Qianqian Sun, Guangqiang Wang, Jun Lin*, and Chunxia Li*

DOI Paper Code Slides

Abstract

An AuPtAg-GOx nanozyme for synergistic tumor immunotherapy induced by starvation therapy-augmented mild photothermal therapy.

Highlights

  • Combines glucose oxidase-mediated starvation with mild photothermal therapy.
  • Uses noble-metal nanozyme design to support tumor immunotherapy.

Add starvation therapy and immune activation details here.

Citation

Man Wang et al. A Noble AuPtAg-GOx Nanozyme for Synergistic Tumor Immunotherapy. Adv. Sci. 2022, 9, 2202332.
